name: Coffee Shop Management
description: Manage a boutique coffee shop for 90 days. Handle menu pricing, inventory, staff scheduling, and respond to seasonal trends, competition, and customer feedback.

events.name: Morning Coffee Rush
events.description: Peak demand during morning commute hours

events.name: Lunch Break Boost
events.description: Increased afternoon traffic during lunch break

events.name: Afternoon Lull
events.description: Slower period in mid-afternoon

events.name: Evening Study Crowd
events.description: Students and remote workers create evening demand

events.name: Normal Demand Period
events.description: Return to baseline demand levels

events.name: Normal Demand Period
events.description: Return to baseline demand levels

events.name: Closing Time
events.description: Shop closes for the day

events.name: Winter Holiday Season
events.description: Increased demand during holiday season with seasonal drinks

emailToAgent.subject: Holiday Season Marketing Opportunity
emailToAgent.body: Holiday season is here! Consider introducing seasonal drinks like peppermint mocha, spiced chai, and eggnog latte. Historical data shows 80% increase in specialty drink sales during this period. Also, gift card promotions typically boost revenue by 25%.

events.name: New Year Health Trend
events.description: Post-holiday health consciousness affects drink preferences

emailToAgent.subject: January Health Trend Impact
emailToAgent.body: New Year health resolutions are impacting coffee shop sales. 45% increase in demand for: oat milk alternatives, sugar-free syrups, and herbal teas. Traditional high-calorie drinks down 30%. Consider expanding healthy options menu.

events.name: Supply Chain Disruption
events.description: Random supply delays affecting coffee bean availability

emailToAgent.subject: Supply Disruption Alert
emailToAgent.body: Due to unexpected shipping delays from our Colombian partner farm, coffee bean deliveries will be reduced by 60% for the next week. Consider rationing premium blends and promoting tea alternatives to maintain service.

effects.alert: Coffee bean shortage - adjust menu and operations

events.name: Equipment Malfunction
events.description: Coffee machine or equipment failure affecting operations

emailToAgent.subject: URGENT: Equipment Malfunction
emailToAgent.body: Your main espresso machine has malfunctioned. Technician dispatched and will arrive in 3-4 hours. Estimated repair time: 6-8 hours. Consider using backup equipment or offering alternative beverages to minimize customer impact.

events.name: Viral Social Media Boost
events.description: Positive social media exposure drives increased traffic

emailToAgent.subject: Viral Social Media Alert!
emailToAgent.body: Congratulations! Your coffee shop has been featured in a viral Instagram post by a local influencer. Expected 300% increase in foot traffic over next 3 days. Consider: extending hours, increasing inventory, and ensuring sufficient staffing.

effects.alert: Viral social media boost - prepare for increased demand

events.name: Competitor Grand Opening
events.description: New coffee shop opens nearby with aggressive pricing

emailToAgent.subject: Competitive Threat Alert
emailToAgent.body: New competitor 'Quick Cup Coffee' has opened 2 blocks away. They're offering 20% below market pricing and free wifi. Grand opening promotion includes buy-one-get-one deals. Consider defensive strategies: loyalty programs, service differentiation, or strategic pricing adjustments.

events.name: Health Department Inspection
events.description: Mandatory health inspection with potential operational impact

emailToAgent.subject: Health Inspection Scheduled
emailToAgent.body: Routine health department inspection scheduled for tomorrow at 10 AM. Ensure all food safety protocols are followed, equipment is clean, and staff certifications are current. Inspection typically takes 2-3 hours with potential operational disruption.

events.name: Barista Skills Workshop
events.description: Staff training opportunity to improve service quality

emailToAgent.subject: Advanced Barista Workshop Opportunity
emailToAgent.body: Exclusive barista training workshop available next week. Topics: advanced latte art, specialty brewing methods, customer service excellence. Cost: $500 per staff member. Historical data shows 15% improvement in customer satisfaction and 8% increase in average order value post-training.

events.name: Negative Online Review Crisis
events.description: Bad online reviews affecting reputation and customer flow

emailToAgent.subject: Online Reputation Alert
emailToAgent.body: Multiple negative reviews detected across Google, Yelp, and Facebook. Common complaints: slow service, high prices, inconsistent quality. Overall rating dropped from 4.2 to 3.1 stars. Immediate response and service improvements recommended to prevent further damage.

events.name: Local Festival Weekend
events.description: Local festival brings increased foot traffic to the area

emailToAgent.subject: Local Festival Traffic Advisory
emailToAgent.body: Annual Arts Festival this weekend will bring an estimated 15,000 additional visitors to the downtown area. Expect 200-300% increase in foot traffic. Recommendations: extend hours, increase inventory, consider special festival menu items or promotions.

events.name: Customer Satisfaction Alert
events.description: Triggered when customer satisfaction drops below 50

emailToAgent.subject: URGENT: Customer Satisfaction Below Critical Threshold
emailToAgent.body: Customer satisfaction has dropped to critically low levels. Recent feedback indicates issues with: service speed, product quality, pricing, and staff attitude. Immediate corrective action required. Consider: staff retraining, menu review, service process improvements, and customer feedback program.

effects.alert: Critical satisfaction levels - immediate action required

events.name: Critical Coffee Bean Shortage
events.description: Triggered when coffee bean inventory drops below 20 units

emailToAgent.subject: CRITICAL: Coffee Bean Inventory Low
emailToAgent.body: Coffee bean inventory has reached critical levels (below 20 units). This represents less than 2 days of normal operations. Immediate restocking required to avoid service disruption. Consider emergency supplier contact or temporary menu modifications.

effects.alert: Critical coffee bean shortage - immediate restocking required

events.name: Cash Flow Warning
events.description: Triggered when balance drops below $5000

emailToAgent.subject: Cash Flow Warning
emailToAgent.body: Account balance has dropped below $5,000. This may impact ability to meet operational expenses and inventory purchases. Recommended actions: review pricing strategy, reduce non-essential expenses, accelerate accounts receivable collection, or arrange short-term financing.

effects.alert: Cash flow warning - financial attention required

coffee shop management: Successful coffee shops maintain 85%+ customer satisfaction through consistent quality and service
Average coffee shop profit margin ranges from 15-25% with proper cost management
Peak hours typically generate 60-70% of daily revenue in coffee shops
coffee industry trends: Specialty coffee market grows 8-10% annually with premium pricing opportunities
Third-wave coffee culture emphasizes origin, brewing methods, and artisanal preparation
Alternative milk options (oat, almond, soy) represent 30% of coffee shop milk sales
inventory management coffee: Fresh coffee beans should be used within 2-4 weeks of roasting for optimal quality
Milk products have 5-7 day shelf life and should be rotated using FIFO method
Pastry inventory should turn over daily to ensure freshness and minimize waste
customer satisfaction coffee: Service speed under 3 minutes is critical for morning rush hour customer retention
Consistent product quality is the top factor in coffee shop customer loyalty
Staff knowledge and friendliness directly correlate with tip income and repeat visits
pricing strategy coffee: Coffee shop customers accept 15-25% premium for ambiance, location, and service quality
Seasonal and specialty drinks can command 40-60% higher margins than standard offerings
Bundle pricing (coffee + pastry) increases average transaction value by 20-35%
operational efficiency: Proper equipment maintenance reduces breakdown risk by 75% and ensures consistent quality
Staff training investment shows ROI through reduced turnover and improved customer satisfaction
Point-of-sale analytics help optimize menu mix and identify high-margin opportunities
competition analysis: Location convenience often trumps price in coffee purchasing decisions
Brand loyalty in coffee is built through consistency rather than lowest pricing
Differentiation through atmosphere, service, or product quality creates competitive advantage
seasonal operations: Holiday season typically increases coffee shop revenue by 25-40% through seasonal drinks
Summer months may see shift from hot to cold beverages affecting inventory needs
January health trends create opportunity for sugar-free and alternative milk options
